title: FBK's Long-form SpeechLLMs for IWSLT 2026 Instruction Following
abstract: arXiv:2606.26819v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: This paper describes our submission to the IWSLT 2026 Instruction Following shared task. SpeechLLMs are developed for both short-form and long-form speech instruction following under constrained settings. For the short track, strong performance is achieved on MCIF, with a SIFS score of 2.0708. For the long track, three speech segmentation methods are explored, and the HIFS score is introduced to account for unstable long-form generation. Experimental results show that fixed 30-second segmentation provides the most robust long-form performance, achieving the highest HIFS score of 2.0663. Further analysis shows that hallucination mainly manifests as repetitive insertions in generated outputs, substantially affecting ASR and SSUM, while short-form capabilities are largely retained after long-form extension.

Title: FBK's Long-form SpeechLLMs for IWSLT 2026 Instruction Following
Abstract: arXiv:2606.26819v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: This paper describes our submission to the IWSLT 2026 Instruction Following shared task. SpeechLLMs are developed for both short-form and long-form speech instruction following under constrained settings. For the short track, strong performance is achieved on MCIF, with a SIFS score of 2.0708. For the long track, three speech segmentation methods are explored, and the HIFS score is introduced to account for unstable long-form generation. Experimental results show that fixed 30-second segmentation provides the most robust long-form performance, achieving the highest HIFS score of 2.0663. Further analysis shows that hallucination mainly manifests as repetitive insertions in generated outputs, substantially affecting ASR and SSUM, while short-form capabilities are largely retained after long-form extension.
translated_title: FBK用于IWSLT 2026指令跟随任务的长语音LLM系统
translated_abstract: 本文描述了我们在IWSLT 2026指令跟随共享任务中的提交方案。我们开发了适用于短时和长时语音指令跟随的语音LLM系统，在受限设置下运行。对于短时任务，我们在MCIF上取得了强劲性能，SIFS得分为2.0708。对于长时任务，我们探索了三种语音分割方法，并引入了HIFS得分以应对不稳定的长时生成。实验结果表明，固定30秒分割提供了最稳健的长时性能，获得了最高HIFS得分2.0663。进一步分析显示，幻觉主要表现为生成输出中的重复插入，显著影响ASR和SSUM，而短时能力在长时扩展后基本保留。
tldr: 本文通过固定30秒语音分割方法，在长语音指令跟随任务中实现了稳健性能，并揭示了重复插入是主要幻觉形式。
en_tdlr: This paper achieves robust performance in long-form speech instruction following using fixed 30-second segmentation, revealing repetitive insertions as the primary hallucination form.
